name: Divine Mercy Retreat
description: A mini-retreat on Divine Mercy led by Fr. John Mockler with talks, Adoration, tea coffee & packed lunch, and Holy Mass. Suggested donation €15

name: The Song of Bernadette
description: Join us for the vigil of St. Bernadette's feast with a film screening of 'The Song of Bernadette' (1943) the classic film  depicting her life. The film will be shown through projection in the Shalom Retreat Centre

name: St. Mark Scripture Retreat
description: Fr. Thomas Cacciola CFR for a deep dive into the gospel of St. Mark for the feast of St. Mark the Evangelist. Featuring Adoration, Lectio, Exegesis on the gospel of Mark
